ETI Educom is a premier Computer Career School dedicated to bridging the gap between academic education and industry requirements. We deliver structured, certification-focused training programs that prepare professionals for successful careers in technology.

Structured Learning Pathways

Career-Focused Training Tracks

Comprehensive programs designed to take you from fundamentals to industry-ready expertise

6 Months

IT Foundation

Digital Literacy & Office Productivity

Build a strong foundation in computing, MS Office Suite, and essential digital skills required for any modern workplace.

View Details
9-12 Months

Design & Marketing

Creative Design + Digital Strategy

Master Adobe Creative Suite, UI/UX principles, SEO, and performance marketing for creative industry roles.

View Details
9-12 Months

IT & Cybersecurity

Infrastructure + Security

Develop expertise in network administration, system management, and cybersecurity operations.

View Details
9-12 Months

Software Development

Programming + Application Development

Learn industry-standard programming languages, frameworks, and software engineering best practices.

View Details

Training Excellence

About ETI Educom

Building Careers Through Industry-Ready Training

ETI Educom is a professionally managed Computer Career School committed to delivering high-quality IT education. Our structured approach combines theoretical knowledge with practical application, ensuring our graduates are fully prepared for industry demands.

Certiport Authorized Testing Center (CATC) for global certifications
ISO 9001:2015 certified quality management system
Curriculum designed in collaboration with industry experts
Dedicated placement cell with strong corporate partnerships
Learn More About UsMeet Our Founder
Our Differentiators

Why ETI Educom is the First Choice of Students

A commitment to excellence that has made us the preferred training institute for aspiring IT professionals

Industry-Aligned Curriculum

Programs designed in consultation with industry experts to match current market requirements

International Certifications

Authorized testing center for Microsoft, Adobe, EC-Council, and Tally certifications

Hands-On Training

Project-based learning with real-world scenarios and industry case studies

Placement Assistance

Dedicated placement cell with 95% placement rate for eligible candidates

Expert Faculty

Learn from certified trainers with extensive industry experience

Flexible Learning

Multiple batch options including morning, evening, and weekend schedules

Our Certification Partners

Industry Insights

The Growing Demand for Cybersecurity Professionals in India

With increasing digital threats, Indian organizations are investing heavily in cybersecurity talent. Learn about career opportunities in this rapidly expanding field.

Digital Marketing

Digital Marketing Skills That Drive Business Growth

The Adobe certification I earned here opened many doors. Faculty support was exceptional throughout my journey.
